channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th July
item.description:
Mixture of junk been there ages

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wotton Road, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 4th July
item.description:
In the side of a alley leading to allotments

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widecombe Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near bus stop N brownhill road SE6 1AE, 4th July
item.description:
The potholes outside our property are causing serious problems. every time vehicles, especially heavy lories drive over them our house shakes and vibrates, particularly during the night. the noise is extremely disruptive and exiting cracks in our property are becoming larger. we are concerned about the risk of further structural damage and request that the road be inspected and repaired as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brownhill Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing litter bins, 4th July
item.description:
The three bins on Banning Street need to be emptied on Saturday and Sunday, not just Monday when paid staff from the River Gardens development have cleared the litter around the bins already. As they do every Monday morning. We are paying tax for this and either need more bins or more emptying. Not a 'scheduled weekly' emptying. It will look even worse tomorrow. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sherman Walk, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car- wheel on Pavement, 4th July
item.description:
The car has been there for 4 months + not moved and has back wheel on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Craydene Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus shelter, 4th July
item.description:
Wells park Road opposite Sydenham Hill Rstate. Please remove graffiti from Bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wells Park Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Weed and rubbish, 4th July
item.description:
Weed growing and rubbish on the side of the road and on pedestrian walkway at Briset Road, Eltham, SE9 6HN. The road and sidewalk hasn't been cleaned for more than 6 months.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Briset Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 4th July
item.description:
Rubbish was dumped in this spot yesterday, overnight foxes have torn through the rubbish bags. This morning rubbish was littered along the road. I have tried to contain the rubbish by sweeping it to the side rubbish composed of dirty nappies which is a hazard. Letters addressed to Rutherglen Road seen in pile.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glendown Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle hire blocking pavement, 4th July
item.description:
Please provide adequate cycle hire and monitor as they block pavement when too many. Note that this area needs a complete redesign that takes into consideration sustainability, trees, pedestrian safety, bins and waste disposal, fly tipping…

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riversdale Road, Stoke Newington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial bin is turning into fly tipping lication, 4th July
item.description:
Please address this to fix this permanently. This location had turned into a fly tipping problem as more waste is deposited daily!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highbury Quadrant, Highbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Homeless Camp, 4th July
item.description:
Looks like the start of a potential homeless camp again. Please nip this in the bud rather that let it progress like it did last year.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green wheelie bin dumped, 4th July
item.description:
There is a green wheelie bin that has been dumped in the road. It’s been moved to a safe place on the pavement- people are putting things in to the bin too. Please can it be removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kings Avenue, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Seat cushions dumped on top of waste bin, 4th July
item.description:
Someone has dumped stuff on top of the waste bin by the bus stop, which is already overflowing and litter is spilling everywhere, including into the woodland!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westmoreland Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 2 black bags by tree outside 97 Griffin Road, Plumstead SE18 7QE., 4th July
item.description:
Been there a few days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes and gouges in the road, 4th July
item.description:
This has been a problem for months and is getting worse. Vehicles go over these and make a loud noise. Please repair asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 297, Pickhurst Lane, West Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The tree in this location has lost a LOT of bark - like someones ripped it off. Puts the tree in danger, 4th July
item.description:
Sorry there's no photo, my phone glitched and didn't save it! But there's a tree that's been damaged purposefully. If it isn't attended to, it will die. It needs some healing and a protection around it if possible

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodmill Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, 4th July
item.description:
This car parks here every day. Why are you letting it?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashwin Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin - full, 4th July
item.description:
This bin was emptied last on Wednesdays 1st July. Was always emptied on a Friday before weekends. Spillage by Monday - not fair for Caretakers to clean up next week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Common, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This drain grill is blocked., 4th July
item.description:
These drain grills have been consistently blocked for a very long time with mixed clearance results. This one at 2/4 Crathie Road has been reported before without success. I believe a car was parked over it when the Contractor arrived and the case was closed! If coming to clear, ensure advanced warning, coned or signed to say No Parking

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crathie Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolley dumped End of Edison Road / passage beside car park, 4th July
item.description:
Trolley dumped End of Edison Road / passage beside car park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Jame's Court, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
